body_txt: When a character pervertedly licks another character on any part of their body or on some other object. Sometimes indicates that a strong and unhealthy attraction or fetish towards something else is present, and it's pretty common for this trait to be given to Memetic Molester characters. Licking one's lips also counts as this. See also You Taste Delicious , Finger-Lickin' Evil , Licking the Blade , Maniac Tongue , and Perverted Drooling . Can also happen in an I Have You Now, My Pretty situation. See also Erotic Eating . May also happen if a character exhibits Bloodlust .
